raw.message: Collect, build, survive. Do whatever it takes to live in the Zombie Apocalypse!

hook.summary: Revealing secret underground bunkers beneath famous landmarks like the Eiffel Tower.
hook.visual_action: A cross-section view pans down from the Eiffel Tower to show a complex multi-story underground shelter.

scene_flow: Cross-section of a multi-level bunker under the Eiffel Tower.
Transition to a bunker hidden beneath a bustling Times Square.
View of a bunker under a roadside convenience store in the rain.
Detailed look at a bunker under a residential house in a forest.
Final shot of a bunker hidden beneath a military tank in the woods.
audience_proxy: Fans of post-apocalyptic survival and base-building games who enjoy detailed cross-section illustrations.
